name: accounting firms managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, cash flow mismanagement causes late payments and client dissatisfaction. We provide automated cash flow monitoring instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to effectively monitor cash flow across multiple clients.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to effectively monitor cash flow across multiple clients.
